skills.title: Technical Expertise
skills.descriptionRest: . With a deep foundation in computer hardware, OS architecture, and networking, I build web applications that aren't just code—they are stable, optimized systems.
skills.deepTechText: From PC building and hardware troubleshooting to complex internet protocols—I understand the physical and logical layers of the web.

projects.portfolioDesc: A self-hosted resume website with an integrated AI chatbot that answers questions about my experience. Built from scratch and running on my Raspberry Pi 5 via Cloudflare Tunnels.
projects.homelabDesc: A production-grade home server running 20 Docker containers including AdGuard Home, SearXNG, RustDesk, Directus CMS, Tailscale VPN and more — all secured behind Cloudflare Zero Trust.

homeLab.title: 🏠 Home Lab
homeLab.storageDetailText: 2× 2TB NVMe SSD in software RAID for redundancy & performance

services.tailscale: Mesh VPN for secure remote access

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.error: ❌ Something went wrong. Please try again.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Intro: This site is designed to be privacy-first. We do not sell your data.
privacy.chatHistoryText: Stored server-side in a database, linked to an anonymous cookie. If you clear the chat using the button in the chat window, your history is permanently deleted.
privacy.preferencesText: We store a small cookie to remember your Dark/Light mode choice.
privacy.visitorIdText: An anonymous cookie is used to link your chat history to your browser. It contains no personal information.
privacy.section2Text: We use Anthropic Claude AI to power the chat. Any prompts you send are processed by Anthropic. We do not send your personal identity to them.
privacy.section3Text: As an EU resident, you have the right to access or delete your data. You can delete your chat history at any time by clicking the clear button inside the chat window. This permanently removes your data from our servers.
privacy.section4Text: To ensure the security and performance of this site, our server automatically logs standard technical information when you visit. This includes your IP address, browser type, and the pages you access.
privacy.section4LegalText: We process this data based on our Legitimate Interest (GDPR Art. 6(1)(f)) to maintain website security, prevent fraud, and allow search engines to crawl and index the site accurately.
privacy.section5Text: Server logs are typically kept for 30 days before being automatically deleted. Your Chat History is stored on our server until you choose to clear it using the chat window. Your Theme Preferences stay on your device until you clear your browser cookies.

chatbot.title: AdotByte AI
chatbot.defaultMessage: Hi! I'm Audrius's AI Agent. I'll remember our chat even if you refresh!
